about.heading: About Codefjell
about.description: Codefjell is a Norwegian sole proprietorship based in Oslo, founded and owned by Babak Asadi Kordshooli. We offer IT consulting, software development, and technology education — working closely with clients to deliver practical, scalable solutions and sharing knowledge through courses accessible to everyone.

logo.heading: Our Logo
logo.description: The Codefjell logo is inspired by Alvand — a mountain peak in western Iran. The name Codefjell combines 'Code' with 'fjell', the Norwegian word for mountain, connecting our technology work with the strength and permanence that mountains represent. Alvand is a personal symbol for our founder, bridging his Iranian roots with his life and work in Norway.

contact.heading: Ready to Get Started?
contact.subtitle: Let's talk about how Codefjell can help your business move forward.

coursesPage.heading: Courses
coursesPage.subtitle: Practical technology education for developers and teams.

systemDesignCourse.title: System Design
systemDesignCourse.subtitle: Learn to architect scalable, reliable systems from first principles.
systemDesignCourse.overview: This course covers the fundamentals of designing large-scale distributed systems. Through practical examples and real-world case studies, you will develop the skills to break down complex requirements into robust technical architectures.
topics: Caching, message queues, and async processing
API integration patterns and best practices
systemDesignCourse.format: Online and in-person (Oslo) — video lectures, exercises, and live Q&A sessions

reactTsCourse.title: React (TypeScript)
reactTsCourse.subtitle: Build modern, type-safe web applications with React and TypeScript.
reactTsCourse.overview: This course teaches you how to build production-ready web applications using React and TypeScript. You will learn how to think in components, manage state effectively, and leverage TypeScript's type system to write more reliable and maintainable frontend code.
topics: Fetching and handling data with TypeScript
reactTsCourse.format: Online — video lectures, exercises, and live Q&A sessions

nodeTsCourse.title: Node.js (TypeScript)
nodeTsCourse.subtitle: Build scalable server-side applications with Node.js and TypeScript.
nodeTsCourse.overview: This course covers building robust backend services using Node.js and TypeScript. You will learn how to design REST APIs, work with databases, handle authentication, and structure your code for maintainability and scale.
topics: TypeScript setup and configuration for Node.js
nodeTsCourse.format: Online — video lectures, exercises, and live Q&A sessions

jsBegCourse.title: JavaScript for Beginners
jsBegCourse.subtitle: Learn the fundamentals of programming with JavaScript — no experience needed.
jsBegCourse.overview: This course is for complete beginners who want to learn programming through JavaScript. Starting from the very basics, you will build a solid foundation in programming concepts and write real code by the end of the first week.
topics: Working with the browser and the DOM
jsBegCourse.format: Online — video lectures, exercises, and live Q&A sessions
